methodology: Products are included when they appear on official Nigerian supermarket or store department pages. The catalogue aims for broad retail coverage across Addide and SPAR Nigeria and does not rank items by popularity.
attribution: Product names and pack facts are source-referenced. Descriptions are original summaries. Barcodes are optional and are included only when separately verified; no barcode is inferred from a retailer SKU.

packs.name: Mini Market 400
packs.description: A 400-product Nigerian mini-market template built from current official supermarket listings without popularity ranking.

packs.name: Supermarket 1,000
packs.description: A 1,000-product Nigerian supermarket template with broader department coverage from official retailer listings.

packs.name: Supermarket 2,000
packs.description: The full staged catalogue with deeper category and variation coverage.
